name: udos-connect
description: uDos family monorepo — npm workspaces for JS/TS packages (core, ui, tools/sonic-express, tools/usxd-express, modules/*) plus core-rs Rust CLI

scripts.build: npm run build -w @udos/shared-types && npm run build -w @udos/shared-utils && npm run build -w @udos/obf-grid && npm run build -w @udos/core && npm run build -w @udos/sonic-express && npm run build -w @udos/usxd-express && npm run build -w @udos/feed-engine && npm run build -w @udos/publish-gateway && npm run build -w @udos/spool-archiver && npm run build -w @udos/vault-manager && npm run build -w @udos/usxd-renderer
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test -w @udos/core
scripts.workspaces:check: npm run workspaces:list > /dev/null && echo "npm workspace resolution OK"
